query: as FO starting up today, i see INDEX.md mtime is 3 days old and entity 058.md was just touched an hour ago — need to refresh the workflow index before i start dispatching today's queue of drafts
Entity 049 is advancing from execute to review. It touched 5 files during execute and i need to flip all 5 CONTRACTS rows from in-flight to final. What's the right operation to use?
plan-checker Dim 7 just flagged a possible cross-entity conflict on tools/dashboard/src/ws-client.ts — need to look up who else is in-flight on that file and whether it's a blocker or warning

captain just approved in clarify stage that we're going client-side for the new filter UI. Need to write this to DECISIONS.md as a new decision entry scoped to tools/dashboard/static/app.js, source entity 068
quality ensign for entity 052 just finished the review checklist, need to record its file touches in the workflow index. Status should still be in-flight since it's heading to uat next
i need to check if D-046-1 (the client-side filter decision from entity 046's clarify stage) is still active or whether it was superseded by any newer decision in DECISIONS.md

my plan for entity 071 proposes changes to tools/dashboard/src/channel-provider.ts — scan the coherence index for recent shipped entries on that file so i know what the last entity did before we started
how do i query workflow-index read mode to get all contract entries for entity 046 across every file it touched during its pipeline run?
idle hook tick — need to rebuild INDEX.md from current entity frontmatter states. There are 47 entities in docs/build-pipeline/ right now
entity 072 got reverted after code review rejection — need to mark its in-flight CONTRACTS rows as reverted so plan-checker doesn't see phantom conflicts
check which React components in the spacedock dashboard use useEffect without a dependency array — looks like a perf bug causing re-render loops in activity-feed
Rebuild the dashboard Bun bundle for production after fixing the ws-client timeout: `bun run build --target bun`. Check if the bundle size regressed
The entity 052 worktree has merge conflicts with main on tools/dashboard/src/ws-client.ts — how do i resolve them manually without losing the exponential backoff changes from execute
Write a CONTRIBUTING.md section explaining how our build-pipeline stages work for new contributors — specifically the difference between pending and ready context_status
i need to find all git commits mentioning 'WebSocket reconnect' in the last 2 weeks on main for the sprint retro — want to count how many entities touched that area
Summarize entity 046's Stage Report into 3 sentences for the weekly eng update — focus on what was shipped and what was deferred
Set up a new stage definition in docs/build-pipeline/_mods/ — what's the YAML schema for adding a new stage called 'security-review' between quality and review?

spacedock dashboard is stuck showing '17 days' for an entity that shipped today — check the channel websocket code in tools/dashboard/static/ws-client.js and see why it's not broadcasting the update event
how do i add a new archive destination for docs/build-pipeline/_archive/ when we hit 200 shipped entities? the single dir is getting unwieldy
trace through the plan-checker logic in skills/build-plan — i want to understand how Dim 7 actually consumes the workflow-index check output and what it does with the issue list
